'''Runck Das''' of [[Domain Das]] was a member of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. During the [[Battle of Garqi]], Das was dispatched by [[Krag Val]] to inform [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Shedao Shai]] that three [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] had engaged the Yuuzhan Vong, and they seemed to be protecting something (the secret of [[Bafforr tree|bafforr]] pollen's reaction to [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|vonduun crab armor]]). Das managed to send a message to Shai, who then arrived and found that Warriors had been burned where they laid. Das said that there was nothing he could have done, but Shai responded that he could have been faster. Commander Shai then pressed his foot down on Das's neck, popping the skull off and killing him.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
